content.problemStatement:
Chef has two arrays AAA and BBB of the same size NNN.

In one operation, Chef can:


Choose an index iii (1≤i≤N)(1 \leq i \leq N)(1≤i≤N) and swap the elements AiA_iAi​ and BiB_iBi​.
Chef came up with a task to find the **minimum** possible value of **(Amax−AminA_{max} - A_{min}Amax​−Amin​)** after performing the swap operation any (possibly zero) number of times.

Since Chef is busy, can you help him solve this task?

Note that AmaxA_{max}Amax​ and AminA_{min}Amin​ denote the maximum and minimum elements of the array AAA respectively.


Input Format

The first line of input will contain a single integer TTT, denoting the number of test cases.
Each test case consists of multiple lines of input.

The first line of each test case contains one integer NNN — the number of elements in each array.
The second line consists of NNN space-separated integers A1,A2,…,ANA_1, A_2,\ldots ,A_NA1​,A2​,…,AN​ denoting the elements of the array AAA.
The third line consists of NNN space-separated integers B1,B2,…,BNB_1, B_2, \ldots ,B_NB1​,B2​,…,BN​ denoting the elements of the array BBB.




Output Format
For each test case, output on a new line, the **minimum** possible value of **(Amax−AminA_{max} - A_{min}Amax​−Amin​)** in the array AAA after doing swap operation any number of times.
constraints: The sum of NNN over all test cases won't exceed 2⋅1052\cdot 10^52⋅105.

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
Test case 111: Chef can make the following operations:

Operation 111: Choose i=1i=1i=1 and swap A1A_1A1​ with B1B_1B1​.

By doing the above operations, array AAA becomes [2,2][2, 2][2,2]. Here (Amax−Amin)=0(A_{max} - A_{min}) = 0(Amax​−Amin​)=0. It can be shown that this is the minimum value possible.
Test case 222: Chef can make the following operations:

Operation 111: Choose i=1i=1i=1 and swap A1A_1A1​ with B1B_1B1​.
Operation 222: Choose i=2i=2i=2 and swap A2A_2A2​ with B2B_2B2​.

By doing the above operations, array AAA becomes [2,3,3][2, 3, 3][2,3,3]. Here (Amax−Amin)=1(A_{max} - A_{min}) = 1(Amax​−Amin​)=1. It can be shown that this is the minimum value possible.
Test case 333: Chef can make the following operations:

Operation 111: Choose i=2i=2i=2 and swap A2A_2A2​ with B2B_2B2​.
Operation 222: Choose i=3i=3i=3 and swap A3A_3A3​ with B3B_3B3​.

By doing the above operations, array AAA becomes [4,3,4,1][4, 3, 4, 1][4,3,4,1]. Here (Amax−Amin)=3(A_{max} - A_{min}) = 3(Amax​−Amin​)=3. It can be shown that this is the minimum value possible.
